steps.title: Use equal side lengths
steps.content: An equilateral triangle has all three side lengths equal. The question already gives $PQ=3{,}860$ millimeters and $QR=3{,}860$ millimeters.

steps.title: Match the third side
steps.content: To prove triangle $PQR$ is equilateral, the remaining side must have that same length, so $PR$ must be $3{,}860$ millimeters. The answer is D.
